name: stablepay-agentpay-dev
description: StablePay wallet, DID registration (client-held keys), OWS/local signing, and payment flows.

backendBaseUrl.description: StablePay API Gateway base URL (docker-compose api-gateway maps 28080:8080)

feePayerSolanaAddress.description: Hotwallet / fee payer pubkey (must match blockchain-adapter hotwallet.json). Alternatively set env STABLEPAY_FEE_PAYER_SOL.

solanaRpcUrl.description: Solana RPC used to build SPL transfer + blockhash

splTokenMintAddress.description: SPL mint for payment token (default devnet USDC per ows-pay.md)

verifyPageBaseUrl.description: Verification page base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:3000/verify

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds (pay flow may need 60s+; gateway payment client uses 90s)

rewardAmount.description: Displayed reward amount for the X verification demo flow

localStatePath.description: Path to the encrypted local plugin state file

localStateKeyEnv.description: Environment variable that provides the master key used to encrypt the local plugin state

owsVaultPath.description: Optional OWS vault path override when a supported OWS runtime is available

owsPassphraseEnv.description: Environment variable that stores the OWS passphrase

owsRestBaseUrl.description: OWS HTTP access layer base URL (enables ows-rest). Body: SignMessageRequest JSON; response must include hex signature.

owsRestSignPath.description: POST path appended to owsRestBaseUrl for signMessage

owsRestApiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name for the REST API token (default STABLEPAY_OWS_REST_API_KEY)

owsRestAuthMode.description: How to send the token: Authorization Bearer, X-API-Key, or raw Authorization value

owsRestWalletId.description: Default OWS wallet UUID for ows-rest signing when not passed at wallet creation

owsRestChainId.description: CAIP-2 chain id for Solana (default solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp)

walletNamePrefix.description: Wallet name prefix used when creating local wallets

didRegisterPath.description: API path used to register a client-side wallet into DID Service

pluginDebug.description: Verbose logs: SPL ATAs, fee payer vs transfer authority, OWS wallet fields. Or set env STABLEPAY_PLUGIN_DEBUG=1

feePayerSolanaAddress.label: Fee payer (hotwallet) address
feePayerSolanaAddress.help: Required for on-chain pay flow; same as blockchain-adapter hotwallet public key

splTokenMintAddress.label: SPL mint
splTokenMintAddress.help: USDC/USDT mint address for the transfer instruction

verifyPageBaseUrl.label: Verify page URL
verifyPageBaseUrl.help: Optional. Used when generating a shareable verify link

localStatePath.label: Local state path
localStatePath.help: Encrypted local state file used by the plugin runtime

localStateKeyEnv.label: State key env
localStateKeyEnv.help: Environment variable used as the master key for local AES-256-GCM encryption

owsRuntime.label: Signing runtime
owsRuntime.help: Prefer auto. Uses OWS SDK, OWS CLI, or OWS REST.

didRegisterPath.label: DID register path
didRegisterPath.help: Default POST /api/v1/did (PRD/tech contract). /api/v1/did/register is an equivalent alias. Server never stores user private keys.
